title: How to Stop Worrying and Start Living
author: Dale Carnegie
subline: Time-tested advice for breaking the worry habit.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A clock face. ONE hour is RED. The hour hand points to it. The minute hand is fixed at 12. The 'worry' is the past (the hours already passed) — shown as faded. The 'today' is the present — the RED hour. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1240)" fill="none" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- Outer circle -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="540" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <!-- 12 hour ticks -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="0" y1="-540" x2="0" y2="-480"/>
      <line x1="270" y1="-467.6" x2="240" y2="-415.7"/>
      <line x1="467.6" y1="-270" x2="415.7" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="540" y1="0" x2="480" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="467.6" y1="270" x2="415.7" y2="240"/>
      <line x1="270" y1="467.6" x2="240" y2="415.7"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="540" x2="0" y2="480"/>
      <line x1="-270" y1="467.6" x2="-240" y2="415.7"/>
      <line x1="-467.6" y1="270" x2="-415.7" y2="240"/>
      <line x1="-540" y1="0" x2="-480" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-467.6" y1="-270" x2="-415.7" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="-270" y1="-467.6" x2="-240" y2="-415.7"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Hour numbers (faint, all ash) -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="0.04em">
      <text x="0" y="-425">12</text>
      <text x="425" y="0">3</text>
      <text x="0" y="450">6</text>
      <text x="-425" y="0">9</text>
    </g>
    <!-- The '12 o'clock' position — RED 2.5px tick + red 'NOW' label -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-540" x2="0" y2="-460" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-540" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <text x="0" y="-580" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.3em">NOW</text>
    <!-- The 'PAST' arc (faint, swept) — represents the hours already gone, where worry lives -->
    <path d="M 0 -540 A 540 540 0 0 1 540 0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4" stroke-dasharray="2 6"/>
    <text x="380" y="-380" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">PAST · WORRY</text>
    <!-- The 'FUTURE' arc (faint, swept) — the hours not yet lived -->
    <path d="M 0 -540 A 540 540 0 0 0 540 0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4" stroke-dasharray="2 6"/>
    <text x="-380" y="-380" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">FUTURE · ANXIETY</text>
    <!-- Hour hand pointing to 3 (i.e., toward PAST) — graphite -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="240" y2="0" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Minute hand pointing to 12 (the NOW) — RED -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="-420" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Center pin -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="12" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="5" fill="#0a0a0a"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Carnegie's frame: worry lives in the past, anxiety in the future; the answer is the present. A literal clock face: 12 hour ticks, hour hand pointing to 3 (the past), minute hand pointing to 12 (the NOW) in RED 2.5px. The 12 o'clock position is marked with a red dot and 'NOW' label. Faint dashed arcs label the upper half 'PAST · WORRY' and the lower half 'FUTURE · ANXIETY'. Title sits in the bottom 1/3, weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand '1948' in the top-left (the year Carnegie wrote it); pill 'TODAY' at the top — the relevance.
